title: Check SSE stream ownership and notification flow

log.context: Check SSE stream ownership and notification flow

Here is the full picture:

**SSE stream ownership: the stdio proxy (discord-plugin)**

The active SSE stream (`sseStreams: 1`, `streamKeys: ["_GET_stream"]`) belongs to the inline stdio proxy process (`bun run --cwd /mnt/data/discord-plugin ... start`, PID 2165610). Claude Code is configured with `"discord-clungus@inline": true` in settings.json, which means Claude Code talks to discord-server exclusively through that bun stdio proxy — not via a direct HTTP connection.
